name: Hecate
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Hecate keeper of keys — crossroads lit by a third flame.
flowText: Hecate keeper of keys — crossroads lit by a third flame.

related.name: ♏ Scorpio
related.teaser: Scorpio is the underworld’s gate — serpent of shadow, phoenix flame, keeper of mysteries.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: XVIII. The Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the dream-lens of the unconscious, a shimmering path of illusion and initiation.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Hades
related.teaser: Hades silent king — wealth of roots, crown of shadows.

related.name: Moonstone
related.teaser: Sacral is the river—pleasure, creation, and the moon’s pull in the blood.

related.name: ᚾ Nauthiz
related.teaser: Nauthiz is the narrow pass — the wise pressure that forges character.

related.name: ᛇ Eihwaz
related.teaser: Eihwaz is the dark yew — the still pillar that outlasts the storm.

related.name: ᛈ Perthro
related.teaser: Perthro is the cup you upend when the question is ready.
